label: Hospitality Pak
blurb: Restaurant Front-of-House, Catering & Food Trucks. Table turns, waste reduction, and event prep.

skills.label: Tip Pool Distributor
skills.method: Takes the night's total credit card tips and splits them between bartenders, bussers, and waitstaff based on hours worked and specific role percentages.
trigger_examples: solves the most toxic, argument-inducing part of restaurant management

skills.label: Allergy Menu Crosschecker
skills.method: Waitress types "Celiac \+ Dairy Free"; the agent cross-references the ingredient database and spits out the 3 safe meals the guest can eat.
trigger_examples: prevents anaphylaxis and saves the kitchen from 20 questions

skills.label: Hostess Wait Time Estimator
skills.method: Predicts accurate wait times by looking at how many tables have just ordered dessert or paid their check, rather than just counting heads.
trigger_examples: stops customers from walking out due to bad wait estimates

skills.label: Health Code Temp Logger
skills.method: Sends a push notification to line cooks every 4 hours requiring them to log the walk-in fridge temperature, escalating to the manager if ignored.

skills.label: Liquor Pour Cost Auditor
skills.method: Compares the weight of empty liquor bottles at the end of the night against the POS system's recorded drink sales to identify over-pouring or theft.

skills.label: Bakery Custom Cake Quoter
skills.method: Translates a customer's Pinterest photo and text request ("3 tiers, fondant, feeds 40") into an accurate price quote based on hourly labor and ingredient costs.
trigger_examples: stops bakers from undercharging for their time

skills.label: Catering Portion Multiplier
skills.method: Takes a family recipe meant for 8 people and mathematically scales the ingredients to feed a 150-person wedding, adjusting for yield loss.
trigger_examples: saves chefs from disastrous catering miscalculations

skills.label: Wholesale Ingredient Price Shopper
skills.method: Scans weekly invoices from Sysco and US Foods, highlighting which purveyor is currently cheaper for bulk chicken breasts or fryer oil.

skills.label: Food Truck Location Broadcaster
skills.method: One text from the owner ("Parked at 4th and Main until 2") updates Google My Business, Twitter, Instagram stories, and the local website simultaneously.
trigger_examples: drives foot traffic without manual social media management

skills.label: Wedding Tasting Feedback Logger
skills.method: Records the bride and groom's feedback during a tasting ("less salt on the steak, more garlic in the potatoes") and updates the final Banquet Event Order.
trigger_examples: ensures the most important meal is perfect
